free_text: Dynamical dipole mode in fusion reactions at 16
Nazionali del Sud using MEDEA spectrometer
The gamma rays and the light charged
particles were detected using the 180 barium
fluoride (BaF2) modules of the MEDEA experimental
apparatus. MEDEA covers the polar angular range
between 30deg and 170deg and has an inner radius of
22 cm. Detectors are located in evacuated scattering
light charged particles was performed by combining a
pulse shape analysis of the BaF2 signal with a time
of flight measurement, achieved with a resolution of
1 ns, between each BaF2 detector and the
